commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Conformance Nightly workflow to cancel superseded same-ref runs and serialize the optional real-adapter matrix on Blacksmith.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a CI scheduling change rather than a reported runtime bug. Review was based on the PR diff, current workflow source, GitHub metadata, and workflow history.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to finish the draft/check workflow and accept the intentional conformance automation tradeoff; there is no concrete ClawSweeper repair task.

target.title: ci: smooth conformance blacksmith runs
target.body:
## What changed
- cancel superseded Conformance Nightly runs for the same ref
- cap the optional real-adapter Blacksmith matrix to one concurrent runner

## Why
The org shares GitHub's runner-registration budget. ACPX is not a current load source, but this keeps the nightly/manual conformance workflow from contributing burst fanout during org-wide CI spikes.

## Evidence
- org workflow scan found the Blacksmith conformance workflow missing cancellation and matrix `max-parallel`
- `ruby -e 'require "yaml"; ARGV.each { |f| YAML.load_file(f) }' .github/workflows/conformance-nightly.yml`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
